text:
Created attachment 217336
Diff of chkascii v2.1 -> v2.2

chkascii has been updated to version 2.2. This update incorporates:

1) Coding improvements
2) Expanded scope with the whole BSD family (and not just FreeBSD) considered valid for application run.
3) License has been switched from GPL to BSD.

poudriere/portlint logs available if needed.
